reviews.notes: Best prospect. Real contact form verified. J. Money responds to everyone. Message is value-first, personal, no backlink ask. Form constraints documented (2000 char limit, reCAPTCHA v3, Akismet). Net worth projector custom example is perfect match for his signature content.
pre_send_checks: Verify form still active before sending
Confirm net worth page URL still valid
Do not mention backlink, anchor text, or SEO

reviews.notes: Nonprofit debt counseling — perfect debt snowball widget fit. Their DMP clients directly benefit. Page verified, calculators confirmed. Contact form exists. Message is specific to their service.
